POST /v1/rma/.description: Creates a new Renovation Management Agreement. Triggers notifications and sets up the contract pipeline.

requestExample.note: Initial RMA for kitchen and bathroom renovation

GET /v1/rma/.description: Returns all RMAs with optional filtering by status, deal, or contractor.

GET /v1/rma/contracts.description: Returns all RMA contract documents across projects.

POST /v1/rma/contracts/{contractId}/sess.description: Creates an edit or signing session for an RMA contract.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}.description: Retrieves an RMA by ID including contract status, activity logs, draw history, and notes.

PATCH /v1/rma/{rmaId}.description: Updates RMA fields — status, amount, draw information, or metadata.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/activity-logs.description: Returns the audit log for an RMA including status changes, contract events, and draws.

POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract.description: Creates a new contract document for the RMA via PandaDoc.

DELETE /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract.description: Deletes the RMA contract. Only drafts can be deleted.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/download.description: Downloads the RMA contract as a PDF.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/edit-sessio.description: Creates or retrieves an edit session for the RMA contract.

POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/send.description: Sends the RMA contract to all recipients for e-signature.

POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/notes.description: Adds a note to the RMA's activity feed.

requestExample.note: Contractor requested schedule extension — approved by PM.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/notes.description: Retrieves all notes for an RMA in chronological order.

POST /v1/support/.description: Submits a new support ticket with contact info and issue details.

requestExample.content: Unable to access estimate for deal #12345

POST /v2/users/.description: Creates a new platform user with role-based access.

GET /v2/users/.description: Returns all platform users with optional filtering by role.

GET /v2/users/owners.description: Returns users designated as HubSpot owners — used for deal assignment.

GET /v2/users/{uid}.description: Retrieves a user profile by Firebase UID including role, permissions, and activity.

PATCH /v2/users/{uid}.description: Updates profile fields for a user. Only included fields are modified.

DELETE /v2/users/{uid}.description: Soft-deletes a user — marks as deleted but retains for audit.

POST /v1/utility/check-home-images.description: Multi-source home image lookup by address. Queries AnyProp, Zillow, RestB, deduplicates results.

POST /v1/utility/deduplicate-images.description: Detects and removes duplicate images using perceptual hashing. Returns only unique images.

POST /v1/utility/house-canary/market-hea.description: Retrieves market health indicators for given ZIP codes using House Canary.

POST /v1/renovation-progress/.description: Creates a weekly renovation progress update for a project.

parameters.onSchedule: Whether the project is on schedule.
parameters.completed: Array of scope item IDs completed this week.

PATCH /v1/renovation-progress/{renovatio.description: Modifies a weekly update — schedule status, completed items, or notes.

PATCH /v1/renovation-progress/what-was-d.description: Updates the free-text summary of work completed.

GET /v2/calendars/.description: Returns all configured calendars for scheduling.

parameters.name: Display name.
parameters.clienttimeout: Timeout in ms for booking operations.

POST /v2/analyze/condition.description: Submits property photos for AI condition analysis. Returns condition score, features, and renovation recommendations.

parameters.imageUrls: Array of image URLs to analyze.

recommendations.description: Cabinets show significant wear — recommend full replacement
Tile grout needs replacement, fixtures dated

POST /v2/analyze/comparables.description: Retrieves comparable sales data based on address and condition score.

POST /v2/analyze/create-report.description: Generates a full property analysis report with condition assessment, comparables, market data, and renovation recommendations.

POST /v2/analyze/photos.description: Analyzes photos to identify rooms, features, and condition issues without a full report.

POST /v2/analyze/reanalyze.description: Re-runs analysis with updated comparable properties.

POST /v2/analyze/feedback/{id}.description: Submits feedback on an analysis report.

GET /v2/analyze/renovation/{id}.description: Retrieves renovation-specific analysis with recommendations and ROI projections.

POST /v2/analyze/v2/comparables.description: Enhanced comparable lookup using V2 analysis engine with improved matching.

GET /v1/vision-ai/.description: Returns all Vision AI property analysis reports.

POST /v1/vision-ai/.description: Creates a new AI property analysis report from photos.

parameters.rejected: Whether this is a re-submission after rejection.

POST /v1/vision-ai/finish-neighborhood-r.description: Completes a neighborhood report and optionally saves photos.

POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-and-r.description: Creates a neighborhood report and registers the user.

POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-photo.description: Processes and analyzes photos for a neighborhood report.

POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-with-.description: Completes a neighborhood report that includes photo analysis.

POST /v1/vision-ai/search.description: Searches Vision AI reports by address or other criteria.

POST /v1/vision-ai/upgrade-to-v2.description: Upgrades a V1 Vision AI report to V2 format.

GET /v1/vision-ai/{id}.description: Retrieves a Vision AI report by ID.

PATCH /v1/vision-ai/{id}.description: Updates fields on a Vision AI report.

POST /v1/vision-ai/{id}/recalculate.description: Recalculates a report with updated timeline or parameters.

parameters.viewOnly: When true, returns results without saving.

POST /v2/vision-ai/.description: Creates a V2 property analysis report with enhanced AI capabilities.

POST /v2/vision-ai/condition.description: Enhanced AI condition analysis with improved accuracy.

PATCH /v2/vision-ai/custom-object/{recor.description: Updates a HubSpot custom object record for a Vision AI report.

POST /v2/vision-ai/images.description: Processes and uploads images for a V2 Vision AI report.

parameters.id: Report ID to add images to.

POST /v2/vision-ai/rejected-report-note/.description: Adds a note explaining why a report was rejected.

POST /v2/vision-ai/scraper.description: Runs the property data scraper for Vision AI reports.

parameters.csv: CSV data object for batch processing.

GET /v2/vision-ai/scraper/csv.description: Exports scraper results as a CSV file.

POST /v2/vision-ai/scraper/generate-repo.description: Generates a full report from scraped property data.

POST /v1/webhooks/affiliate-partners.description: Handles incoming referral data from affiliate partners. Called by partner systems.

POST /v1/webhooks/gvg.description: Handles incoming data from GVG for property valuation updates.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/createCompany.description: Handles HubSpot workflow action to create a company record.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/invite-realtor.description: Handles HubSpot workflow to invite a realtor to the platform.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/production.description: Handles production events from HubSpot workflows.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/revive-team.description: Handles HubSpot actions for internal team notifications.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateCompany.description: Handles HubSpot workflow to update company records.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateContract.description: Handles HubSpot workflow to sync contractor data.

POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateRealtorE.description: Handles HubSpot workflow to update a realtor's Edge URL.

POST /v1/webhooks/pandadoc/linked-object.description: Handles PandaDoc events for document-object associations.

POST /v1/webhooks/pandadoc/project-scope.description: Handles PandaDoc events to sync project scope items from signed documents.

POST /v1/webhooks/website-case-study.description: Receives case study data from the marketing website.
